source: Daily Cash Balancing workbook + POS sales summary
trigger_match: One JE per business day from cash balancing tab.
posting_logic: Dr 1010 opening/closing cash movement; Dr 1020 card/debit/cash deposit lines; Cr 4010 sales; Cr 2300 HST; post gift cards/house accts/ecomm/cash over-short as separate lines.
auto_level: Auto-post after translation table is finalized
exception_logic: If cash sheet line uses legacy code with no QB translation, hold in review queue.
evidence: Daily JEs 1848-1916 and Feb cash tabs

trigger_match: Cash sheet lines 'House Acct Charge' and 'House Acct Payment'.
posting_logic: Charge: Dr 1085 House Accounts / Cr sales side inside daily JE. Payment: Dr bank or EFT clearing / Cr 1085 House Accounts.
exception_logic: If payment amount does not appear in daily sheet or memo mismatch, send to review.

source: Daily Cash Balancing workbook + HH support invoices
trigger_match: Gift card / e-gift / home gift card / loyalty lines on cash sheet; monthly HH loyalty invoice.
posting_logic: Post gift card activity to 5020 Giftcards; post loyalty redemption asset/liability activity to 1096 and expense to 6330 when support invoice is received.
exception_logic: If loyalty/gift card support does not match cash sheet total, hold for review.

source: Cash balancing report + store pickup gateway CSV
trigger_match: Cash sheet 'ECOM' amount on pickup date; cross-check to gateway statement detail.
posting_logic: Dr 1095 Ecommerce for dealer amount awaiting payout; Cr 4010 sales; Cr 2300 HST. Record related fees to 6320 Ecommerce based on gateway statement if not already netted in JE.
exception_logic: If gateway statement total for period does not reconcile to daily ECOM entries, hold payout cycle open.

source: Gateway payment CSV + bank feed / HH settlement
trigger_match: Electronic payment sent amount in gateway CSV matches bank deposit or HH settlement amount within a date window.
posting_logic: Dr 1020 bank (or Dr 2030 HH AP if netted through HH settlement) / Cr 1095 Ecommerce. Book 6320 fees and 2300 HST fee component if payout JE includes them.
exception_logic: If payout is netted or split across bank / HH AP and not one-for-one, send to review.

source: TD bank feed + HH weekly remittance
trigger_match: Bank memo 'HOME HARDWARE MSP' / remittance total.
posting_logic: Dr 2030 Accounts Payable - HHSL / Cr 1020 TD Canada Trust.
exception_logic: If amount does not match a weekly remittance, leave unmatched in HH AP queue.

trigger_match: Month-end HH statement imported for Bridlewood.
posting_logic: Book statement detail by invoice/document number. Warehouse inventory to 1120. Five Year Notes / Special Shares / HH advertising / HST lines booked from statement detail. Offset to 2030 HH AP.
exception_logic: If statement line cannot be mapped to an invoice or category, hold in HH exception queue.

trigger_match: Invoice number match from HH direct invoice (large real estate invoices usually 30-40k).
posting_logic: Split invoice by line description: Dr 6010 Rent, Dr 6020 Property Taxes, Dr 6050 Common Area Expense, Dr 6550 Other Store Expenses (pylon sign), Cr 2201 Accrued Rent or Cr 2030/2020 depending on workflow. Do not trust remittance label alone.
exception_logic: If invoice OCR cannot confidently identify line split, require human review.

trigger_match: Warehouse invoice number in HH statement / remittance.
posting_logic: Default Dr 1120 Inventory; HST per invoice; offset to 2030 HH AP via statement import.
exception_logic: If invoice contains non-inventory service lines, split and review.

source: Vendor direct invoice PDF / HH statement
trigger_match: Invoice number in remittance / statement; read invoice body.
posting_logic: Classify by invoice content, not remittance label. Inventory vendors to 1120. Non-inventory vendors to correct expense account (e.g., shipping / occupancy / store expense).
exception_logic: If vendor not seen before or account classification confidence < threshold, require review.

trigger_match: Vendor name indicates shipping / courier rather than inventory vendor.
posting_logic: Dr shipping or courier expense (Bridlewood currently uses expense path, not inventory) / Cr AP or HH AP depending on source.
key_accounts: Use shipping-related expense account; not 1120 Inventory
exception_logic: If vendor could be inventory and freight-in, review manually.
evidence: User instruction: Purolator is shipping expense

source: Rebate support + bank deposit + close package
trigger_match: Monthly accrual or actual rebate cash receipt.
posting_logic: Monthly accrual: Dr 1105 HHSL Rebates Accrual / Cr 5030 HHSL Rebates. Cash receipt: Dr 1020 Bank / Cr 1105 HHSL Rebates Accrual.
exception_logic: Large one-time annual patronage / quarter-end items should route to review.
evidence: JE 1954 and JE 1906; FY25 recurring pattern

trigger_match: Bank memo ENetEmployer / payroll batch date.
posting_logic: Dr 6120 Wages & Benefits; Dr 2220 Vacation Payable portion; Dr 6160 Payroll Fees; Cr 1020 Bank. Include HST on payroll fees only if present.
exception_logic: If CPS summary does not reconcile to bank debit, hold batch for review.

trigger_match: Pay period crosses month-end.
posting_logic: Dr payroll expense accounts / Cr 2210 Accrued Payroll for unpaid days at month-end. Reverse next month.
exception_logic: No entry if month-end falls on payroll cycle end (as in Feb-26).
evidence: FY25 GL shows day-count accruals; no Feb-26 posting

trigger_match: Insurance or WSIB vendor document imported.
posting_logic: Dr 6130 Group Insurance or Dr 6140 WSIB / Cr AP. HST per invoice if applicable.
exception_logic: If invoice period overlaps with prepaid schedule, send to review.

trigger_match: Month-end close.
posting_logic: Dr 6150 Employer Health Tax / Cr 1200 Prepaid Expenses (or other EHT clearing used by Bridlewood schedule).
exception_logic: If annual EHT return true-up changes amount, route to review.

trigger_match: Month-end close.
posting_logic: Amortize building and vehicle insurance from 1200 Prepaid Expenses into 6360 / 6370.
exception_logic: If new policy or invoice amount changes, update prepaid schedule first.

trigger_match: Month-end close.
posting_logic: Dr 6410 Accounting / Cr 2202 Accrued Accounting. Reverse when vendor bill recorded.
exception_logic: If year-end bill or special project invoice received, review actual bill against accrual.

trigger_match: Month-end close.
posting_logic: Dr 6900 Depreciation / Cr 1650 A/D - Provision.
exception_logic: If fixed asset additions/disposals occur, update schedule before posting.

trigger_match: Bank memo LN PYMT 966037102 (or equivalent).
posting_logic: Split cash payment between Dr 2500 Term Loan principal and Dr 6280 Interest on Term Loan; Cr 1020 Bank.
exception_logic: If bank amount differs from amort schedule, send to review.

trigger_match: Filed sales tax JE and CRA payment.
posting_logic: File: Dr 2300 HST Payable / Cr 2301 GST/HST Suspense. Payment: Dr 2301 / Cr 1020.
exception_logic: If tax filing period or payment amount differs, route to review.

trigger_match: Month-end close after inventory finalized.
posting_logic: Book inventory/COGS adjustment from report, usually Dr 5010 Purchases - COS / Cr 1120 Inventory for decrease.
exception_logic: If report missing or physical / system inventory mismatch is abnormal, require review.

trigger_match: Month-end support from HH / Prism charges.
posting_logic: Reclass from inventory to expense: store use to 6510; donations to 6695; loyalty/email/dealer support to 6330 / 6670 as supported.
exception_logic: If support invoice line descriptions are unclear, review manually.

trigger_match: TD memo TAX PYT FEE / SEND E-TFR FEE / BRW Billing / EFT Billing / SERVICE CHARGE / OVERDRAFT INTEREST.
posting_logic: Dr 6260 Bank Service Charges or Dr 6270 Overdraft Interest / Cr 1020 Bank.
exception_logic: If memo unknown, classify as uncoded bank item.

trigger_match: Vendor/memo text rules (Amazon, ADT, Petro-Canada, Google, Primus, etc.).
posting_logic: Reclass credit card expenses to normal Bridlewood accounts based on vendor dictionary. Preserve AP bill payments as AP clears, not expense duplicates.
exception_logic: Unknown vendor or mixed-use spend goes to card review queue.
evidence: TD - Spencer Visa transactions in Feb GL
